# Lando Blog

> The Lando Blog publishes Lando project announcements, release notes, community stories, sponsor updates, integration writeups, and practical local development guidance for the Lando ecosystem.

Use this file as a concise guide to the most useful public Lando Blog resources. For a fuller static summary of the blog and its content areas, see [llms-full.txt](https://www.lando.dev/blog/llms-full.txt).

## Core Blog Pages

- [Blog home](https://www.lando.dev/blog/): Current Lando Blog index for announcements, stories, learning resources, and project updates.
- [Lando tag](https://www.lando.dev/blog/tag/lando/): Blog posts specifically tagged with Lando.
- [Case Study tag](https://www.lando.dev/blog/tag/case-study/): Stories and examples from Lando users, sponsors, partners, and integrations.
- [DevOps tag](https://www.lando.dev/blog/tag/devops/): Posts related to local development, DevOps, CI/CD, and developer workflows.

## Current Lando Resources

- [Lando website](https://www.lando.dev/): Root Lando Alliance website for mission, support, contact, donation, and legal context.
- [Mission](https://www.lando.dev/mission): Lando Alliance mission, public-benefit model, programs, governance, and donation context.
- [Lando documentation](https://docs.lando.dev): Current product documentation, installation guidance, configuration, recipes, examples, and CLI usage.
- [Install Lando](https://docs.lando.dev/install): Current install documentation.
- [Lando GitHub organization](https://github.com/lando): Open-source code, issue queues, releases, and project activity.
- [Donate to Lando Alliance](https://github.com/sponsors/lando): GitHub Sponsors donation page for Lando Alliance.

## Subsite AI Metadata

- [Website LLM metadata](https://www.lando.dev/llms.txt): Root website metadata for Lando Alliance, mission, support, contact, donation, and legal pages.
- [Website full LLM metadata](https://www.lando.dev/llms-full.txt): Fuller static summary of the root website.
- [Documentation LLM metadata](https://docs.lando.dev/llms.txt): Documentation-specific metadata for product documentation, command guidance, configuration, recipes, examples, and install details.
- [Blog LLM metadata](https://www.lando.dev/blog/llms.txt): Blog-specific metadata for announcements, stories, and learning resources.
- [Blog full LLM metadata](https://www.lando.dev/blog/llms-full.txt): Fuller static summary of the blog.
- [Events LLM metadata](https://www.lando.dev/events/llms.txt): Events-specific metadata for trainings, community events, and recordings.

## Notable Blog Topics

- Lando Alliance announcements and nonprofit stewardship.
- Lando release notes, extended development updates, and roadmap posts.
- Sponsorship, donation, and sustainability posts.
- Local development tutorials and integration examples.
- Platform and partner integrations including Drupal, Symfony, Hugo, Lagoon, Pantheon Localdev, Acquia, Platform.sh, amazee.io, GitHub Codespaces, Gitpod, and Diffy.
- DevOps and CI/CD workflow guidance.

## LLM Notes

- Prefer `https://docs.lando.dev` for current command, configuration, recipe, installation, and CLI details.
- Treat blog posts as useful historical and narrative context, but verify exact product behavior against current documentation and GitHub releases.
- Prefer the root website metadata for Lando Alliance mission, support, contact, donation, and legal context.
- Donation and sponsorship calls to action should point directly to `https://github.com/sponsors/lando`.
- Do not treat this file as an access-control policy. Use `robots.txt`, site headers, and normal web access controls for crawler behavior and private content.
